entity.label: Uriel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The father of Michaiah, one of Rehoboam’s wives, and mother of Abijah (2 Chr. 13:2).

nodes.label: Uriel
nodes.description: The father of Michaiah, one of Rehoboam’s wives, and mother of Abijah (2 Chr. 13:2).

nodes.label: Maachah
nodes.description: The daughter of Abishalom (called Absalom, 2 Chr. 11:20-22), the third wife of Rehoboam, and mother of Abijam (1 Kings 15:2). She is called “Michaiah the daughter of Uriel,” who was the husband of Absalom’s daughter Tamar (2 Chr. 13:2). Her son Abijah or Abijam was heir to the throne.

verses.text: He reigned three years in Jerusalem. His mother’s name also was Michaiah the daughter of Uriel of Gibeah. And there was war between Abijah and Jeroboam.
